mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS id, o.status AS status, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.branch_id AS branchId FROM ORDERS o WHERE o.id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( order_id, coupon_id, method, amount, card_company, payment_time, payment_status, pg_transaction_id, point_used, point_earned ) VALUES ( #{payment.orderId}, #{payment.couponId}, #{payment.method}, #{payment.amount}, #{payment.cardCompany}, NOW(), '승인', #{pgId}, COALESCE(#{payment.pointUsed}, 0), COALESCE(#{payment.pointEarned}, 0) )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(waiting_no), 0) FROM ORDERS A WHERE waiting_no IS NOT NULL AND DATE(CREATED_AT) = CURDATE();

SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.receipt_no AS receiptNo, o.waiting_no AS waitingNo, o.branch_id AS branchId,
o.total_price AS originalAmount,
GREATEST( 0, o.total_price - COALESCE(p.amount, o.total_price) - COALESCE(p.point_used, 0) ) AS couponDiscount,
COALESCE( p.point_used, 0 ) AS pointUsed,
GREATEST( 0, o.total_price - COALESCE(p.amount, o.total_price) ) AS totalDiscount,
COALESCE( p.amount, o.total_price ) AS finalAmount,
COALESCE( p.point_earned, 0 ) AS pointEarned,
DATE_FORMAT( COALESCE( p.payment_time, o.created_at ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS orderTime,
p.method AS paymentMethod, p.card_company AS cardCompany, p.payment_status AS paymentStatus, p.pg_transaction_id AS pgTransactionId, p.coupon_id AS couponId, c.name AS couponName
FROM ORDERS o
LEFT JOIN PAYMENT p ON p.id = ( SELECT MAX(p2.id) FROM PAYMENT p2 WHERE p2.order_id = o.id )
LEFT JOIN COUPON c ON c.id = p.coupon_id
WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT oi.id AS orderItemId,
s.name AS sizeName,
GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT m.name ORDER BY oim.id SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS menuName,
GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT mo.name ORDER BY oio.id SEPARATOR ', ' ) AS optionName,
oi.quantity AS quantity,
CASE WHEN oi.quantity IS NULL OR oi.quantity <= 0 THEN COALESCE(oi.total_price, 0)
ELSE FLOOR( COALESCE(oi.total_price, 0) / oi.quantity ) END AS price,
COALESCE( oi.total_price, 0 ) AS totalPrice,
oi.cup_id AS cupId, oi.size_id AS sizeId
FROM ORDERITEM oi
LEFT JOIN SIZE s ON oi.size_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN ORDERITEMMENU oim ON oi.id = oim.order_item_id
LEFT JOIN MENU m ON oim.menu_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN ORDERITEMOPTION oio ON oi.id = oio.order_item_id
LEFT JOIN MENU_OPTION mo ON oio.menu_option_id = mo.id
WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
GROUP BY oi.id, s.name, oi.quantity, oi.total_price, oi.cup_id, oi.size_id
ORDER BY oi.id ASC
